name: Von Lycaon
description:
Von Lycaon is a white furred anthropomorphic wolf fighter in a dapper suit with fluffy spiky hair, black leather belt buckles worn around his face (covering his one eye), with a red ascot, red irises, cyborg mechanical legs. He is a melee (heavy kicker) fighter character who belongs in Victoria Housekeeping faction.
Can resolve any matter. The most trusted of attendants, and solid support for any team.
Rational and wise, a true gentleman who can't tolerate a single stain.
Offers absolute loyalty to the one he decides to follow.
Though outwardly sophisticated and rational, his innate feral character will reveal itself when faced with certain dangers.
creator: Peachxohearts
